login.title: Admin Console
login.heading: Personel Admin Console
login.subtitle: Enterprise employee activity monitoring platform
login.ssoNote: Sign in securely with your corporate identity provider (Keycloak).
login.loginDescription: Sign in securely with your corporate identity provider.
login.kvkkNotice: This system operates under KVKK (Law No. 6698). By signing in, you accept the system policies.

callback.missingParams: Missing parameters. Please sign in again.
callback.exchangeFailed: Token exchange failed. Please try again.
callback.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
session.invalid: Invalid session. Please sign in again.

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

cards.activeEndpointsDesc: Signal received in the last 5 minutes

disabled.title: DLP Service Disabled
disabled.description: Keystroke content is encrypted at rest but no DLP patterns are being matched. Follow the mandatory ceremony to enable DLP.

active.title: DLP Active
active.description: Keystroke content is being processed by the DLP engine.

actions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this endpoint's token? The agent will no longer be able to connect.
actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this endpoint? This action cannot be undone.

enrollment.hostnameHint: Network hostname of the Windows computer
enrollment.tokenWarning: This token is shown only once. Copy it securely.

employees.title: Employee Monitoring
employees.subtitle: Today's activity rollup for every employee

empty.noData: No data for today. The seed script may not have run.

topApps.title: Top Applications
topApps.description: Application ranking by active usage time

idleActive.title: Idle / Active Analysis
idleActive.description: Period-based idle vs active time comparison

blockingEvents.title: Blocking Events
blockingEvents.description: Policy blocking and DLP event history

appBlocks.title: App Blocking Events
appBlocks.description: Applications blocked by policy and event counts

request.title: Live View Request
request.subtitle: IT Manager approval required. Approval must come from a different user.
request.kvkkNoticeBody: Live view may only be used for legitimate purposes within the proportionality principle. Every session is logged to the audit trail.
request.dualControlNote: This request must be approved by a different user with the IT Manager role (dual control). You cannot approve your own request.
request.successToast: Live view request submitted. Awaiting IT Manager approval.
request.reasonCodeHint: Ticket number, incident ID, or investigation reference. Free text only is not accepted.
request.approvalNotice: This request must be approved by a different user with the IT Manager role.
request.submitted: Request submitted. Wait for approval notification.

viewer.title: Live View Session
viewer.auditNoticeBody: All actions during this session are recorded to the audit trail.
viewer.notActiveBody: This session cannot be viewed right now. State: {state}
viewer.timeWarning: 2 minutes remaining! Session will auto-terminate shortly.
viewer.terminateDesc: Enter a reason for termination. This action is irreversible and will be logged.

approval.title: Live View Approval Queue
approval.subtitle: Requests awaiting IT Manager approval
approval.selfApprovalBlocked: You cannot approve your own request.
approval.selfApprovalTooltip: Dual control: The requester and approver must be different users.
approval.approveConfirm: Do you want to approve this live view session?
approval.denyConfirm: Are you sure you want to deny this request?

session.endConfirm: Are you sure you want to end this live view session?

dsr.title: Data Subject Requests (KVKK m.11)
dsr.subtitle: Manage personal data subject access requests

actions.noActions: No actions available for this state: {state}
actions.respondDesc: Enter the response artifact reference to close the request.
actions.extendDesc: A justification is required per KVKK.

response.artifactNote: The response artifact must not contain raw personal data. Enter only a MinIO object path or encrypted document reference.
response.artifactHint: MinIO bucket/key path or secure download reference.

respond.title: Respond to Request
respond.artifactRefHint: MinIO object path or document reference

new.title: New Data Subject Request
new.subtitle: Exercise data subject rights under KVKK Article 11
new.kvkkBody: Data subjects can exercise: access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability rights. All requests must be answered within 30 days.
new.slaNote: The 30-day SLA begins when the request is submitted.
new.adminInitiatedHint: This form is rarely used. Employees typically apply via the Transparency Portal.

legalHold.title: Legal Hold
legalHold.subtitle: Available to Data Protection Officer only
legalHold.dpoOnly: This action is restricted to the Data Protection Officer (DPO) role.

release.title: Release Legal Hold
release.warning: After release, record TTLs will be recalculated and overdue records will be deleted.

evidence.title: SOC 2 Evidence Locker
evidence.subtitle: Control-level evidence coverage matrix and auditor pack export
evidence.gapDescription: The following controls have zero evidence for this period. The corresponding collectors must be wired before the SOC 2 Type II observation window closes.
evidence.emptyState: No evidence found for this period
evidence.historyHint: Amber cells indicate no evidence was produced for that month (gap). Green shades intensify with evidence density.

destructionReports.title: Destruction Reports
destructionReports.subtitle: 6-month periodic data destruction reports (required by KVKK Regulation)
destructionReports.autoGenerated: Reports are auto-generated on January 1 and July 1 each year.

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Immutable hash-chained audit log
audit.noRecordsHint: Try clearing filters or broadening the date range.

verify.title: Chain Verification
verify.subtitle: Hash chain integrity check
verify.algorithmBody: Each record includes the hash of the previous record. This cryptographically guarantees that no record can be modified after the fact.
verify.retentionNote: Records are retained for 5 years in accordance with KVKK Article 7 and related legislation.

chain.errorBody: Could not retrieve chain status. Please try again.
chain.validBody: All records cryptographically verified. No tampering detected.
chain.brokenBody: A gap was found in the hash chain. This may indicate one or more records were modified.

sensitivityGuard.title: Sensitivity Guard
sensitivityGuard.subtitle: KVKK m.6 sensitive data processing guardrails
sensitivityGuard.windowTitleRegexHint: Patterns for window titles containing sensitive data (health, union, religion, etc.)
sensitivityGuard.sensitiveHostGlobsHint: Mask access to sensitive sites such as health portals
sensitivityGuard.excludeAppsHint: Application names that will never be captured in screenshots

push.title: Push Policy
push.pushDescription: This policy will be signed and delivered to the selected endpoints via NATS.

dlp.title: DLP Settings
dlp.subtitle: Data Loss Prevention service status and opt-in ceremony

disabled.heading: DLP Service Off (Default)
disabled.body: This is the secure default. Keystroke content is encrypted at rest but no process holds the decryption key — the system is technically 'keystroke-blind'.
disabled.legalClaim: In this configuration: 'No process on this system has ever held the keystroke decryption key.' — provable from Vault audit logs.

active.heading: DLP Service Active
active.body: Keystroke content is being processed by the DLP engine for pattern matching. All employees receive a notification in the Transparency Portal.

ceremony.title: DLP Enable Ceremony
ceremony.subtitle: The following steps are REQUIRED to enable the DLP service. The console cannot bypass this ceremony.
ceremony.warning: There is no 'Enable' button in this console. This is by design (ADR 0013).

1.title: 1. DPIA Amendment
1.body: The DPO must update the organization's DPIA to cover active DLP processing. Must be signed by legal counsel.

2.title: 2. Written Sign-Off Form
2.body: DPO + IT Security Director + Legal Counsel must sign the template. Form: docs/compliance/dlp-opt-in-form.md

3.title: 3. Operator Script
3.body: A Personel operator with the vault-admin role must run the following script:

4.title: 4. Transparency Notification
4.body: After the script completes successfully, the Transparency Portal will display a DLP activation notice to all employees.

5.title: 5. Audit Checkpoint
5.body: The enable event will be written to the hash-chained audit log and included in the daily signed checkpoint.

ceremony.disableBody: To disable DLP: infra/scripts/dlp-disable.sh — This revokes the Secret ID, stops the service, and creates an audit record.

tenants.title: Tenant Settings
tenants.liveViewHistoryRestricted: Restrict Employee Live View History Visibility
tenants.liveViewHistoryRestrictedHint: When disabled, DPO must provide written justification and an audit record is created.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: View your account information
profile.keycloakNote: To change your account information, contact your Keycloak portal.

silence.title: Silence Management
silence.subtitle: Monitor and acknowledge agent signal gaps
silence.description: View heartbeat gaps (Flow 7) that exceed the expected interval and acknowledge them with reason codes.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.restrictedRole: Only Investigator and DPO roles can access.
screenshots.reasonCodeRequired: A reason code is required to access images.
screenshots.auditNotice: Every image access is written to the audit log.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.heading: Access Denied
unauthorized.body: You do not have the required role to view this page. Please contact your system administrator.
unauthorized.subtitle: You do not have permission to view this page.
unauthorized.contactAdmin: Contact your system administrator to request access.
